items.title: Showa-era Japan visual novel Be Missed and Remembered: The Letter from Mayoiga launches on Steam at 10% off
items.title_zh: 昭和時代視覺小說《Be Missed and Remembered: The Letter from Mayoiga》上架 Steam 優惠 10%

items.title: Chainsmoker Cat’s cast was told to treat “That was terrible” as a compliment during production. Yaniko and Yakuko voice actresses talk about their roles
items.title_zh: 《Chainsmoker Cat》聲優 Yaniko、Yakuko 分享：製作團隊把『很糟』當褒獎

items.title: Hands-on preview: Palworld’s official card game turns battles and Pal labor into a surprisingly faithful TCG
items.title_zh: 《Palworld》官方卡牌遊戲試玩：戰鬥和勞動力變成超忠實 TCG

items.title: Koei Tecmo has expanded its workforce from 2,500 to over 3,000 in two years, remains committed to target of 5,000
items.title_zh: Koei Tecmo 兩年內把員工數從 2,500 擴到 3,000，續衝 5,000 目標

items.title: Meccha Chameleon copycat game on Steam blatantly calls itself “Meccha Chameleon” in Korean version
items.title_zh: Steam 山寨《Meccha Chameleon》韓版竟同名「Meccha Chameleon」

items.title: Serial Experiments Lain to get an unofficial visual novel following success of the fan made OVA crowdfunding project
items.title_zh: 《Serial Experiments Lain》將推非官方視覺小說，延續粉絲製OVA募資成功的熱度

items.title: Square Enix shuts down its 15-year-old “Western game” publishing label, saying overseas titles no longer need exotic treatment in Japan
items.title_zh: Square Enix關閉經營15年的「西方遊戲」發行品牌，稱海外作品在日本已無需特別對待

items.title: As Sony prepares to end physical disc production, game publisher Astrolabe Games vows to release physical PS5 editions for all its eligible titles
items.title_zh: Sony 停產光碟，Astrolabe Games 承諾推 PS5 實體版

items.title: Marvel Tokon: Fighting Souls region lock removed in several countries following fan backlash
items.title_zh: Marvel Tokon 粉絲反彈後解除地區限制

items.title: Indie developer says Steam helped fix their game in time for Next Fest instead of rejecting last-minute unbootable build
items.title_zh: 獨立開發者讚 Steam 搶救遊戲趕上 Next Fest

items.title: Mystery game My Fav Chill Streamer Dies a Million Times tasks you with rewinding your favorite VTuber’s steams to prevent them from dying
items.title_zh: 謎題遊戲《我最愛的宅宅實況主死了百萬次》讓你倒帶最愛VTuber的直播以阻止他們掛掉

items.title: “Each ability feels like it could have been the central mechanic of its own game.” We ask a fellow developer what makes NTE: Neverness to Everness so impressive
items.title_zh: 「每個能力都像獨立遊戲機制」開發者談《NTE: Neverness to Everness》絕妙

items.title: Nostalgic train sim Retro Rail GO! renamed to Retro Rail Japan! as developer commits to continuing the project following plagiarism accusations in Japan
items.title_zh: 《Retro Rail GO!》改名《Retro Rail Japan!》 開發商為抄襲風波力挽狂瀾

items.title: Monster Fantasy developers address similarities to Monster Hunter, say the game will feel quite different when you actually play it
items.title_zh: 《Monster Fantasy》開發者回應《Monster Hunter》相似，強調實玩大不同

items.title: Ikaruga creator announces his cancelled shooter Ubusuna is set for revival, with funding talks underway
items.title_zh: Ikaruga 製作人宣布取消射擊遊戲 Ubusuna 將復活，融資談判中
